TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min Yinmingtay han no holam no kwaping ko Tilifi no Yincuming . O sa'ayaway nikacitilifi no Yincuming i Taywan ato i salaloma' no Aziya. Edeng onini a cecay ko tilifi no mita o Yincuming. Itiya i 2004 mihecaan 12 a folad saka 1 a romi'ad a mahayda no Yinminghoy , saka mapatireng kona Tilifi no Yincuming, nikawrira i salaloma' no Tayse ko polong no likakawa noya tilifi. Tangsa i 2005 mihecaan saka 8 a folad saka 23 a romi'ad a masomad, o Tongsen a Tilifi ko sitodongay. Namatira, i salaoma' nonini a demak, adihay ko nikalalifet no harateng no cisakowanay a tamdaw, tangasa i 2007 mihecaan saka 1 folod saka 1 a romi'ad ta so'linay o yincumingto ko sitodongay to polong no likakawa nora tilifi, ta i saka 4 folad saka 1 a rom'ad a mapangangan to Tilifi no Yincuming a saan. Itini i laloma' no tayal noya tilifi, mapolongay ko 'Amis, Taloko, Punun, Pariwan, Saysiya ato romaroma a fnacadan. Ano mipasadak sato to singpong ko singpongkisya hawi, makakotakotay ko painiay, macacalicaliw to romi'ad a papelo ato pasadak to masamaamaanay a kamok. O iraay a kamok anini i tilifi hawi, masilsil i rarikor: • O singpongkisya i salaloma' nona Tilifi, masilsil ko ngangan i kaikor: • 日茉樂嫚 • Kolas Yotaka •
S.PHON: pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u jən-ʦo~u~u-min jinmiŋtaj ħan no~u ħo~uɾam no~u kwapiŋ ko~u tiɾifi no~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ . o~u saʡajawaj nikaʦitiɾifi no~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ i tajwan ato~u i saɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u a*ija. əɬ~ɮəŋ o~unini a ʦəʦaj ko~u tiɾifi no~u mita o~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ. itija i **** miħəʦaan ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a maħajɬ~ɮa no~u jinmiŋħo~uj , saka mapatirəŋ ko~una tiɾifi no~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ, nikawrira i saɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tajsə ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾikakawa no~uja tiɾifi. taŋsa i **** miħəʦaan saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a maso~umaɬ~ɮ, o~u to~uŋsən a tiɾifi ko~u sito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. namatira, i saɾao~umaʡ no~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nikaɾaɾifət no~u ħaratəŋ no~u ʦisako~uwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, taŋasa i **** miħəʦaan saka * fo~uɾo~uɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ta so~uʡɾinaj o~u jinʦo~u~umiŋto~u ko~u sito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾikakawa no~ura tiɾifi, ta i saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umʡaɬ~ɮ a mapaŋaŋan to~u tiɾifi no~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ a saan. itini i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tajaɾ no~uja tiɾifi, mapo~uɾo~uŋaj ko~u ʡamis, taɾo~uko~u, po~u~uno~u~un, pariwan, sajsija ato~u ro~umaro~uma a fnaʦaɬ~ɮan. ano~u mipasaɬ~ɮak sato~u to~u siŋpo~uŋ ko~u siŋpo~uŋkisja ħawi, makako~utako~utaj ko~u painiaj, maʦaʦaɾiʦaɾiw to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a papəɾo~u ato~u pasaɬ~ɮak to~u masamaamaanaj a kamo~uk. o~u iraaj a kamo~uk anini i tiɾifi ħawi, masiɾsiɾ i rariko~ur: * o~u siŋpo~uŋkisja i saɾaɾo~umaʡ no~una tiɾifi, masiɾsiɾ ko~u ŋaŋan i kaiko~ur: * **** * ko~uɾas jo~utaka *
S.FORM: Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min Yinmingtay han no holam no kwaping ko Tilifi no Yincuming . O sa'ayaway nikacitilifi no Yincuming i Taywan ato i salaloma' no Aziya. Edeng onini a cecay ko tilifi no mita o Yincuming. Itiya i 2004 mihecaan 12 a folad saka 1 a romi'ad a mahayda no Yinminghoy , saka mapatireng kona Tilifi no Yincuming, nikawrira i salaloma' no Tayse ko polong no likakawa noya tilifi. Tangsa i 2005 mihecaan saka 8 a folad saka 23 a romi'ad a masomad, o Tongsen a Tilifi ko sitodongay. Namatira, i salaoma' nonini a demak, adihay ko nikalalifet no harateng no cisakowanay a tamdaw, tangasa i 2007 mihecaan saka 1 folod saka 1 a romi'ad ta so'linay o yincumingto ko sitodongay to polong no likakawa nora tilifi, ta i saka 4 folad saka 1 a rom'ad a mapangangan to Tilifi no Yincuming a saan. Itini i laloma' no tayal noya tilifi, mapolongay ko 'Amis, Taloko, Punun, Pariwan, Saysiya ato romaroma a fnacadan. Ano mipasadak sato to singpong ko singpongkisya hawi, makakotakotay ko painiay, macacalicaliw to romi'ad a papelo ato pasadak to masamaamaanay a kamok. O iraay a kamok anini i tilifi hawi, masilsil i rarikor: • O singpongkisya i salaloma' nona Tilifi, masilsil ko ngangan i kaikor: • 日茉樂嫚 • Kolas Yotaka •
S.PHON: pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u jən-ʦo~u~u-min jinmiŋtaj ħan no~u ħo~uɾam no~u kwapiŋ ko~u tiɾifi no~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ . o~u saʡajawaj nikaʦitiɾifi no~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ i tajwan ato~u i saɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u a*ija. əɬ~ɮəŋ o~unini a ʦəʦaj ko~u tiɾifi no~u mita o~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ. itija i **** miħəʦaan ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a maħajɬ~ɮa no~u jinmiŋħo~uj , saka mapatirəŋ ko~una tiɾifi no~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ, nikawrira i saɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tajsə ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾikakawa no~uja tiɾifi. taŋsa i **** miħəʦaan saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a maso~umaɬ~ɮ, o~u to~uŋsən a tiɾifi ko~u sito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. namatira, i saɾao~umaʡ no~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nikaɾaɾifət no~u ħaratəŋ no~u ʦisako~uwanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, taŋasa i **** miħəʦaan saka * fo~uɾo~uɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ta so~uʡɾinaj o~u jinʦo~u~umiŋto~u ko~u sito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾikakawa no~ura tiɾifi, ta i saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umʡaɬ~ɮ a mapaŋaŋan to~u tiɾifi no~u jinʦo~u~umiŋ a saan. itini i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tajaɾ no~uja tiɾifi, mapo~uɾo~uŋaj ko~u ʡamis, taɾo~uko~u, po~u~uno~u~un, pariwan, sajsija ato~u ro~umaro~uma a fnaʦaɬ~ɮan. ano~u mipasaɬ~ɮak sato~u to~u siŋpo~uŋ ko~u siŋpo~uŋkisja ħawi, makako~utako~utaj ko~u painiaj, maʦaʦaɾiʦaɾiw to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a papəɾo~u ato~u pasaɬ~ɮak to~u masamaamaanaj a kamo~uk. o~u iraaj a kamo~uk anini i tiɾifi ħawi, masiɾsiɾ i rariko~ur: * o~u siŋpo~uŋkisja i saɾaɾo~umaʡ no~una tiɾifi, masiɾsiɾ ko~u ŋaŋan i kaiko~ur: * **** * ko~uɾas jo~utaka *
